TEXT.citation: Wikipedia contributors. (2026). Atayal Wikipedia. Wikimedia Foundation. Retrieved 2026-06-09, from https://tay.wikipedia.org/
TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay, title = {Atayal Wikipedia}, author = {{Wikipedia contributors}}, year = {2026}, publisher = {Wikimedia Foundation}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/}, urldate = {2026-06-09} }

S.FORM: alang Haising ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 169 buwan, 574 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 521 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 53 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 65%, Rukay 1%, Cou 5%, Paywan 6%, Hla'aluwa 11%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. tay 'llaw na Haising hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Haising hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Haising hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Haising hya' ga rgyax krahu'.
S.PHON: alaŋ ħais~ɕiŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, rukaj *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%, ħlaʔaluwa **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. taj ʔllaw na ħais~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ħais~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħais~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħais~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ.
S.FORM: alang Haising ga niya mki sku Takaw Si atu Toweng Ku, kwara sali buwan nya ga 169 buwan, 574 hi ku kwara s'uli tayan. s'uli tayan pinspngan Gyencumin ga 91% kyan ku 521 hi, binah ga, 'yat kahun sku pinspngan Gyencumin ga 9% kyan ku 53 hi nya. pinspung na linhuyan Gyencumin ga, Bunun 65%, Rukay 1%, Cou 5%, Paywan 6%, Hla'aluwa 11%, Amis 2%, binah lihuyan s'uli 1%. maki qu ngasal bziran. tay 'llaw na Haising hya' ga llyung. tay 'zil na Haising hya' ga rgyax krahu'. tay mkyahu' na Haising hya' ga llyung. tay mkraya' na Haising hya' ga rgyax krahu'.
S.PHON: alaŋ ħais~ɕiŋ ɣa nija mki s~ɕku takaw s~ɕi atu toweŋ ku, kwara s~ɕali βuwan nja ɣa *** βuwan, *** ħi ku kwara s~ɕʔuli tajan. s~ɕʔuli tajan pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa **% kjan ku *** ħi, βinaħ ɣa, ʔjat kaħun s~ɕku pins~ɕpŋan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa *% kjan ku ** ħi nja. pins~ɕpuŋ na linħujan ɣjenʦ~ʨumin ɣa, βunun **%, rukaj *%, ʦ~ʨou *%, pajwan *%, ħlaʔaluwa **%, amis~ɕ *%, βinaħ liħujan s~ɕʔuli *%. maki qu ŋas~ɕal βziran. taj ʔllaw na ħais~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj ʔzil na ħais~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ. taj mkjaħuʔ na ħais~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa lljuŋ. taj mkrajaʔ na ħais~ɕiŋ ħjaʔ ɣa rɣjax kraħuʔ.
